description: TTO step-vs-improvement curve with hinge loss (correct checkpoint)
notes: Hinge loss BEATS xent at all step counts from 50+. At 500 steps: hinge 0.145 vs xent 0.192 (24% improvement). SegNet improvement is dramatic: 0.000639 vs 0.001259 (49% better). PoseNet comparable. Hinge loss confirmed as P0 breakthrough.
